description:
Where To Buy Health Insurance For Maximum Benefits ? The Real Picture ! #insuranceimpact 
 #hindi #harvindersingh #insuranceagent #insuranceagency #healthinsurance #mediclaim #insurance 

📑25 Lessons I wish I Knew (e-book) - https://bit.ly/41MEODP
     Read On Kindle- https://www.amazon.in/dp/B0F295T5VG
📲 Ask your query - https://bit.ly/3FJium2
🔔 Join the Impact Buddy family - https://bit.ly/4l7cvra      
Join 🟢💬 WhatsApp & Stay ahead ! 📢✨ https://bit.ly/4hrGGGL 

FROM WHERE SHOULD I BUY MY HEALTH INSURANCE POLICY?

 It's a question to think about very clearly as a lot of services related to the coverage depends on this decision. So in today's video we will discuss:
 Should you Buy a health insurance policy from an Agent?
Should you buy a Health plan from A broker/Web Aggregator?
Or We should buy Health Insurance directly from the Insurance Company?
What is the cheapest option among these to buy a Health Insurance Plan?
What is the best Option for Claim Support to buy Health Insurance?
What are the advantages and disadvantages of Buying Health Insurance from the Insurance Company Itself?
What are the advantages and disadvantages of Buying Health Insurance from the Insurance Broker?
What are the advantages and disadvantages of Buying Health Insurance from the Insurance Agent ?
All this will be discussed in this video , so don't miss the video..

आप हमारे वीडियो को पसंद करते हैं, तो आप हमें सब्सक्राइब कर सकते हैं:

comments.text:
Most important thing in this video - that single Point of Contact. Due to customer support getting pathetic day by day -> it is now turning more and more important to re-adopt traditional methods since even big companies are putting customer support in such a way that you talk to Bots, they connect to Person A -> who arranges a call back from Person B and when person B calls at adhoc basis (while you are unavailable) -> you need to repeat process by calling Bot -> A and again B 
Support service or calling same point of contact is absolutely necessary to not explain whole story again and again as its our money at stake
I had this experience just today and i find myself lucky to find your video which changed my mind to now go through Agent even if i have shortlisted exact product i purcahsed
comments.author: @vaibhavgandhi2009

comments.text:
I had bad experience with Ditto, although its true they do not spam. I booked a call to inquire about insurance that I can buy. I mentioned all my health conditions truthfully(my age is 24 years). Although I am totally healthy, there are a couple of issues in my report which can be fixed using regular exercise and diet control. 
Firstly the agent from ditto took an whole day time to go through all my health conditions, and after a day the plan suggested by the agent was very bad. I mean atleast suggest a costlier plan, if cheap is not possible. The agent only tried to sell me 1 plan, of Care Supreme, which I didnt like at all. I was planning to buy a cover of 10 lakhs or 20 lakhs, he came up with a plan of maximum cover of 3 lakhs and having room rent limit and copay. I asked if there is any other plan that you can suggest me, and the agent said no. There are atleast 10 to 15 insurance company and he could suggest me only 1 plan, very bad experience from ditto.
comments.author: @birajde3649

aapne eak important factor ki bat hi nahi ki.

premium

online direct sabse sasta hai.
policy bazar se more or less same premium.
par dirct agent ka 30-40% comission hota hai premium jo add ho kar milta hai extra payable premium mai.
starting ke premium big nahi lagte par jab hum senior citizen ke ass pass ho jate hai tab humari income nahi hoti because hum retired ho chuku hote hai. but premium lakho mai aata hai jisme unka add-on comission 30-40% rehta hai .

comments.text:
Thanks for your Vedeo.
However, I will be happy, if you
can guide me for complications
in respect of my Health Policy
which I already having from
STAR Insu. Co. and obtained 
through Bank of India.
Therefore, I belive it is called
as "CORPORATE" Policy.
My problem is for RENEWAL of
my existing Policy of last year
which was Valid up to 17/4/24.
Policy was to be Renewed 
w.e.f 17/4/24.
Therefore, as per advised by
representative of STAR & connected with Bank of India,
I paid necessary Premium amount
to company as on 12/4/24
Before due date of RENEWAL
through Cheque of Bank of India.
Amount paid by me was Debited
from my Bank Account in the
name of STAR Co. I received 
necessary Bank message at my
Mobile. Subsequently, when I
enquired with Represantative
on his Mobile about issue of
my Renewal of my Policy, he
informed me, do not worry, you
will get it.  It will take little time.
Their after, as on 28/5/24, 
I received Message from Bank
of India, amount which was I paid
has been Credited at my Account 
which has been from STAR Co.
I therefore contact to Rep. who
informed me that at present, I am
not handling issue of Policy
(Bank of India). Some other 
person is handling Bank of India
matter regarding issue of Policy.
I was therefore upset and confused
and approached STAR Co. and
informed them that instead of 
getting my RENEWAL Policy,
I have received back, amount paid
by me for Renewal of Policy.
I therefore send email to Company
please look into matter & do
the needful to get me Renewal
Policy. They informed me, since
Master Policy is not renewed 
therefore there is no Option
applicable for renewal of your 
Policy. They also informed to
Bank to assist me on Priority.
I approached to Bank for this
Matter but they did not Solved 
my problem. Bank informed me
to turn up later on due to other
